llm_analysis.summary: DXFactor drives digital transformation with AI-first approach, serving enterprises, and growing through partnerships and new practice launches, with a focus on outcome-driven technologies and data solutions.

recommended_services.reason: Directly addresses uncertainty on where to start with AI and enterprises early in AI adoption.
Directly addresses enterprises with legacy CRM/ERP and sales and finance ops teams.
Directly addresses lack of actionable insight and data-heavy businesses.
